hook.text: God, you look so pretty when you tell me that you love me I wish that I could lie, but my mind gets in the way I know you think it all, always way too self aware Oh, we could never be together, but it's nice to play pretend I wish that I could lie, but I'm way too self aware
hook.emotional_mechanism_raw: Vulnerability, self-awareness, relatability from a romantic confession
hook.target_audience_raw: Young adults possibly with chronic illness or anxiety

main_claim.text: You have about 8 minutes with your GP and must use specific details to avoid dismissal.

supporting_explanation.summary: The caption explains the time pressure (8 minutes), the risk of being dismissed, and advises preparing specific symptom notes. It offers a service for endometriosis patients who need help organizing those notes.

funnel_rationale: Broad awareness building around a universal problem (GP appointment anxiety) targeting potential endometriosis patients.

cta.wording: If you're not sure where to start, we can help. We specialise in supporting patients with endometriosis, so if you're struggling to put together clear notes before your next appointment, just drop us a WhatsApp message. Link in bio.
cta.requested_action_raw: Send a WhatsApp message via the link in bio
cta.value_exchange_raw: Help organizing symptom notes for GP appointment
